problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
